feat.name: Directed Channel
feat.text: You can shape the energy you channel in a single direction. When you cast a version of harm or heal that has an area, you can make its area a 60-foot cone instead of a 30-foot emanation.

traits.name: Cleric
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the cleric class.
